full_text:
Guo Si 郭汜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Si (郭汜)was born in Zhang Ye City (Presently Zhang Ye City in Gan Su Province). Served Dong Zhuo. Later took control of the imperial court with Li Jue. Guo Si was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and Niu Fu. Guo Si lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
